title: Air Jordan I 'Chicago' (1985) — The Story Behind The Drop
excerpt: The blueprint of sneaker culture. Designed by Peter Moore, Michael Jordan wore this colorway to match the Chicago Bulls uniform. It laid the…
content:
## The Story

**Air Jordan I 'Chicago'** · Originally released 1985 · $65 · Style 4280 / 555088-101

The blueprint of sneaker culture. Designed by Peter Moore, Michael Jordan wore this colorway to match the Chicago Bulls uniform. It laid the foundation for high-top luxury basketball products.
